formulas.name: Consumer Protection Act, 1986
formulas.formula: A legislation enacted to protect consumers' rights
formulas.notes: Key legislation for consumer protection in India

formulas.name: Consumer Rights
formulas.formula: Right to Safety, Right to Information, Right to Choose, Right to Be Heard, Right to Seek Redressal
formulas.notes: Five fundamental rights of consumers as per Consumer Protection Act, 1986

formulas.name: District Consumer Disputes Redressal Forum (DCDRF)
formulas.formula: A quasi-judicial body to resolve consumer disputes
formulas.notes: One of the three tiers of consumer dispute redressal forums

formulas.name: State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (SCDRC)
formulas.formula: A quasi-judicial body to resolve consumer disputes
formulas.notes: Second-tier of consumer dispute redressal forums

formulas.name: National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (NCDRC)
formulas.formula: The apex body to resolve consumer disputes
formulas.notes: The highest tier of consumer dispute redressal forums

formulas.name: Consumer Courts
formulas.formula: Courts established to resolve consumer disputes
formulas.notes: Courts that can hear consumer disputes under the Consumer Protection Act, 1986
